name: Barbarian

recommended.why: Fury of Blood greatly increases HP and Damage Reduction, allowing Barbarian to survive longer while protecting allies through taunts, shields and crowd control. The set perfectly complements his role as a frontline tank.

alternative.why: Titan's Might is a solid alternative for players looking to increase Barbarian's offensive pressure while still maintaining respectable durability during early progression.

investment.why: Barbarian is one of the best Legendary tanks for Horde teams and provides excellent value throughout the early and mid game. His taunts, shields and debuffs make him a reliable frontline hero until he is eventually replaced by Mythic tanks in optimized end-game lineups.

description: Barbarian is a Legendary Horde tank specializing in crowd control, survivability and enemy disruption. His powerful defensive abilities allow him to protect allies while weakening enemy teams, making him a dependable frontline hero for Horde players progressing through the early and mid game.
